name: ADM
specialty: Oils, lecithins, plant proteins, MCT, omega-3
notes: Global commodity ingredient giant; strong in fats/oils and plant-based proteins

name: AIDP
specialty: Branded ingredients, botanicals, probiotics, collagen
notes: Exclusive US distributor for many branded/patented ingredient suppliers (e.g. Kaneka, GanedenBC30)

name: Actus Nutrition
specialty: Whey protein isolate/concentrate, casein, milk protein
notes: US-based dairy processor; strong in sports nutrition proteins; vertically integrated

name: American Botanicals
specialty: Herbal extracts, botanical powders, plant-based actives
notes: Specializes in standardized botanical extracts for dietary supplements

name: Ashland
specialty: Cellulose excipients (MCC, HPMC), coating systems, binders
notes: Major pharma excipient supplier; Benecel and Klucel product lines widely used in tablets/capsules

name: Balchem
specialty: Choline, mineral chelates, encapsulated nutrients
notes: Known for VitaCholine and chelated minerals; encapsulation technology for heat-sensitive nutrients

name: BulkSupplements
specialty: Vitamins, amino acids, botanicals, sports nutrition inputs
notes: Direct-to-manufacturer bulk ingredients; broad catalog, lower MOQs

name: Cambrex
specialty: Active pharmaceutical ingredients, fine chemicals
notes: Primarily pharma-facing; high-purity specialty actives

name: Capsuline
specialty: Gelatin capsules, HPMC vegetarian capsules, softgels
notes: Wide range of empty capsules in all sizes and colors; also offers contract filling

name: Cargill
specialty: Starches, maltodextrin, citric acid, stevia, sweeteners, oils
notes: One of the world's largest food ingredient companies; strong in sweeteners (Truvia stevia) and texturizers

name: Colorcon
specialty: Film coatings, tablet binders, MCC, silicon dioxide, disintegrants
notes: Global leader in pharmaceutical film coating systems and excipients; Opadry and Surelease product lines

name: Custom Probiotics
specialty: Custom probiotic blends, Lactobacillus/Bifidobacterium strains
notes: High-potency probiotic powders; custom strain combinations; no fillers/additives

name: Darling Ingredients / Rousselot
specialty: Gelatin, collagen peptides, hydrolyzed collagen
notes: Rousselot is the world's leading gelatin/collagen producer; Peptan collagen peptide brand

name: FutureCeuticals
specialty: Fruit/vegetable powders, coffeeberry, sport performance actives
notes: Vertically integrated from farm to ingredient; known for CoffeeBerry and CarnoSyn beta-alanine distribution

name: Gold Coast Ingredients
specialty: Natural flavors, colors, sweeteners, functional food ingredients
notes: West Coast specialty ingredient distributor; strong in flavors and natural colors

name: IFF
specialty: Natural flavors, extracts, enzymes, cultures, texturizers
notes: One of the top 3 global flavor houses; acquired DuPont Nutrition & Biosciences (2021)

name: Icelandirect
specialty: Icelandic fish oil, omega-3 concentrates, marine ingredients
certifications: IFOS 5-star, Friend of the Sea, MSC
notes: Direct importer of Icelandic marine oils; traceability from catch to capsule

name: Ingredion
specialty: Starches, maltodextrin, sweeteners, texturizers, plant proteins
notes: Major global ingredient company; strong in clean-label texturizers and specialty starches

name: Jost Chemical
specialty: High-purity mineral salts: magnesium, zinc, calcium, iron, potassium
notes: Specializes in ultra-high-purity mineral salts for pharmaceutical and nutraceutical use

name: Koster Keunen
specialty: Natural waxes, beeswax, carnauba wax, lipid excipients
notes: Leading supplier of natural waxes for supplement coatings, lip care, and food applications

name: Magtein / ThreoTech LLC
specialty: Magnesium L-threonate (Magtein)

name: Mueggenburg USA
specialty: Specialty chemicals, food-grade raw materials, cosmetic ingredients
notes: Mid-size specialty distributor; broad portfolio across food, pharma, and personal care

name: Nutra Blend
specialty: Vitamin/mineral premixes, custom blends
notes: Primarily animal nutrition; also produces human nutrition vitamin/mineral premixes

name: Nutra Food Ingredients
specialty: Functional food ingredients, nutraceutical actives, botanical extracts
notes: Specialty distributor focused on nutraceutical and functional food markets

name: Nutri Avenue
specialty: Amino acids, vitamins, plant extracts, sports nutrition inputs
notes: B2B bulk ingredient supplier with broad catalog; competitive pricing

name: Prinova USA
specialty: Amino acids, vitamins, minerals, proteins, botanical extracts
notes: One of the largest US ingredient distributors; huge catalog breadth across all supplement categories

name: PureBulk
specialty: Vitamins, minerals, amino acids, nootropics, botanicals
notes: Direct-to-consumer and B2B bulk ingredients; very broad catalog; transparent lab testing

name: Sensient
specialty: Natural colors, synthetic colors, flavor systems, specialty extracts
notes: Global leader in natural and synthetic food colors; also produces flavors and specialty ingredient systems

name: Source-Omega LLC
specialty: Algal DHA/EPA, vegan omega-3 concentrates
notes: Specialty supplier of plant-based/algae-derived omega-3 fatty acids; vegan alternative to fish oil

name: Specialty Enzymes & Probiotics
specialty: Digestive enzymes, systemic enzymes, probiotic cultures
notes: US manufacturer of enzyme blends and probiotic ingredients for dietary supplements

name: Spectrum Chemical
specialty: USP/NF reference standards, fine chemicals, lab reagents
notes: Broad-catalog chemical distributor; USP-grade materials for pharma/nutra validation and production

name: Stauber
specialty: Functional food ingredients, nutraceutical actives, personal care inputs
notes: West Coast specialty distributor across food, supplement, and personal care markets

name: Strahl & Pitsch
specialty: Natural waxes, beeswax, carnauba, rice bran wax, specialty fats
notes: US manufacturer and importer of natural waxes and specialty fats for supplements and food coatings

name: TCI America
specialty: High-purity fine chemicals, biochemicals, building blocks
notes: US arm of TCI (Japan); primarily research-grade chemicals; pharma and specialty ingredient use

name: Trace Minerals
specialty: ConcenTrace ionic minerals, trace mineral complexes, electrolytes
notes: Known for Great Salt Lake-derived trace mineral concentrates; strong in ionic/colloidal minerals

name: Univar Solutions
specialty: Broad chemical distribution: citric acid, excipients, functional ingredients
notes: One of the world's largest chemical distributors; covers food, pharma, and industrial segments

name: Virginia Dare
specialty: Natural and artificial flavors, vanilla extracts, flavor systems
notes: Specialty flavor house with 100+ year history; known for vanilla and custom flavor solutions
